tagline: Family-owned electricians serving Sonoma County for 45+ years
seoDescription: LoDolce Electric is a family-owned, licensed electrician serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County for 45+ years. Residential and commercial wiring, panel and lighting upgrades, repairs, new construction, and Generac standby generator installation and service. CA Lic. #1026407.
heroHeading: Sonoma County's family electricians for 45+ years
heroSubheading: Clean, code-compliant electrical work for homes and businesses across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County — plus expert Generac standby generator service. Licensed, insured, and done right the first time.
highlights: Authorized Generac generator service & repair dealer
Most Generac factory-trained techs in Sonoma, Napa & Marin combined
aboutHeading: Three generations of trusted Sonoma County electricians
aboutBody: The LoDolce family has provided residential and commercial electrical contracting to Sonoma County for more than 45 years. Owner Joe LoDolce followed in his father's footsteps, learned the trade from the ground up, and now leads the team with the same reliable standards customers have trusted for decades.

As an Authorized Generac service and repair dealer, LoDolce Electric has more Generac factory-trained, certified technicians than any other company in Sonoma, Napa, and Marin counties combined — so your standby generator is ready when the next PSPS or outage hits. From a single outlet to whole-house wiring, Joe's team treats every job like it's in their own home: clean work, honest guidance, and transparent pricing.
servicesHeading: Full-service electrical for homes and businesses

services.title: Residential Electrical
services.description: Safe, clean electrical work for your home — lighting installation and upgrades, dedicated circuits, panel improvements and labeling, plus outlets, switches, and dimmers.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.description: Professional service for offices, retail, and facilities, including tenant improvements, lighting retrofits and controls, dedicated equipment circuits, and troubleshooting with minimal disruption.

services.title: Generator Services
services.description: Backup power you can count on. As an Authorized Generac dealer, LoDolce Electric handles standby generator installation planning, transfer switches, maintenance, and troubleshooting to keep your home or business running during outages.

services.title: New Construction
services.description: Complete rough-in to final electrical for new builds, additions, and remodels — service planning, lighting plans, and final trim support.

services.title: Electrical Repair
services.description: Troubleshooting and reliable fixes for breakers, outlets, switches, flickering lights, and general power problems.

services.title: Electrical Service & Upgrades
services.description: Scheduled visits for ceiling fans, GFCI/AFCI updates, circuit additions, and safety improvements that keep your electrical system current and code-compliant.

testimonials.quote: Great price. Family owned and professionally driven! Joe and his wife Cammie are running a customer service oriented business. They responded to my needs on schedule and fixed my service panel in one call. LoDolce Electric represents the type of company this retired General Contractor looks forward to work with. Definitely a 5+ star business.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

testimonials.quote: Joe installed my stand-by generator 5 years ago, and has provided excellent support and maintenance since then. In this era of PSPS's, having a stand-by generator with reliable service is almost required.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

testimonials.quote: Prompt, knowledgeable and easy to discuss the situation in lay-man terms. The job was done quickly and correctly. Great folks in the office and in the field.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

notes: Verified via lodolceelectric.com (home/about/services), CSLB (Lic. #1026407, owner Joseph Kendall LoDolce, Windsor CA), BuildZoom, and Yelp. Confirmed: 45+ yrs family-owned, Joe LoDolce owner (father's trade), Authorized Generac dealer with most factory-trained techs in Sonoma/Napa/Marin, M–F 8–5, service area Santa Rosa + Sonoma County. Testimonials carried from prior scrape (Jim G / Craig Gagnon / Dana Morgan). Omitted: exact founding year (only '45+ years' stated, no specific year verifiable).
